== Notes for [[Item:Q101370|Q101370]] ==

Note: The legend of the Horowitz family descent from the Halevi family of Spain has been called into question and appears to be a fabrication of the late 19th century. As a result, this profile has been disconnected from [https://www.geni.com/people/Josef-Halevi-of-Horovice/6000000010102780086 '''Joseph HaLevi, [Horowitz progenitor]''']

See: [http://www.avotaynuonline.com/2016/03/does-the-horowitz-family-from-bohemia-really-descend-from-the-benvenisti-halevy-family-from-spain/ Does the Horowitz Family from Bohemia Really Descend from the Benvenisti Halevy Family from Spain? [AB-067] ]

Other family trees do not agree with these apparent findings and support the connection to the Bohemian Horowitz line.

[http://berdichevsky.tribalpages.com/family-tree/berdichevsky/1195/804/Benvenisti-HaLevi-Family '''Berdichevsky-Sokolka Families Tree, Benvenisti-HaLevi-Family''']

[http://berdichevsky.tribalpages.com/family-tree/berdichevsky/1195/101/Yosef-Horvitz-Family '''Berdichevsky-Sokolka Families Tree - Yosef-Horvitz-Family'''] [link is broken; 404 error as of 7/20/16 -- cat yronwode]

Iggeret Sholomo (Fruchter Yichus) page Tet-Vav (Daled)

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9CEE881EFBBFA9822EF79916C59DA
geni:6000000003933480146

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
